allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: exclude TASK.md from version control

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: code quality improvements from code review

- Add ARIA accessibility attributes across all components
- Setup ESLint with TypeScript and React plugins
- Simplify CardType from array to single value
- Add shared SynergyEngine singleton
- Improve import deck validation
- Use memoized Map for O\(1\) card quantity lookups
- Add theme tokens for semantic colors
- Remove development-only debug features
- Add JSDoc documentation to hook return types
- Add type guard for CardType filtering
- Fix unused imports and lint errors
- Add tests for loader.ts and SynergyEngine \(43 total tests\)
- Add README.md and PLANNING.md documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: migrate to feature-based architecture

Reorganize codebase from layer-based structure \(components/, hooks/, 
types/\) to feature-based structure \(features/cards/, features/synergies/,
features/deck/, shared/\).

- Create feature modules with types, components, hooks, and utils
- Add barrel exports \(index.ts\) for clean imports
- Distribute types across feature modules
- Move shared components and constants to shared/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd /c "dir ""C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"" 2>nul || echo Not found")
